cards.scientific_summary: This 78-residue candidate is cationic, moderately hydrophobic, cysteine-rich, and compositionally consistent with a possible membrane-active peptide candidate. The AMP plausibility signal is weak-to-moderate and derived from non-authoritative, incompletely calibrated models. The strongest deterministic concern is broad predicted protease susceptibility, alongside uncertainty from cysteine oxidation state and limited assay-neighbor evidence.
